content: TASK-063 checkpoint done: Fixed Prototype map interaction instability. renderMap() now aborts the previous map pointer/wheel listeners before installing new ones, releases active pointer capture during cleanup, clears dragging state on pointerup/pointercancel/lostpointercapture/window pointerup/window blur, and avoids starting map drag from buttons/selects/controls. Flow-map layout also precomputes outgoing transitions by node to avoid repeated edge filtering during depth traversal. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts, npm run build, and browser smoke on http://localhost:5173/ plus /examples/screenflow-map.html confirmed drag no longer stays grabbed and Map/Play/Next remain clickable after dragging. TASK-056 performance remains open; next optimization target is broader layout/render recomputation and dense edge path costs.
